title: Aehr Test Systems Q3 2026 Reports Mixed Results
text: Aehr Test Systems reported Q3 fiscal 2026 results on April 7, 2026. Revenue declined to $10.3 million from $18.3 million in the prior year, reflecting near-term execution challenges. However, the company reported exceptional bookings of $37.2 million with a book-to-bill ratio exceeding 3.5x and an effective backlog of $50.9 million. The dramatic bookings increase reflects strong AI processor and data center infrastructure demand. Management guided for second-half fiscal 2026 bookings at the high end of the $60-80 million range and full-year revenue on the high side of the $45-50 million guidance. The company expects to return to non-GAAP profitability in Q4 FY26. Significant customer wins include production orders from major hyperscaler clients building advanced AI accelerators.
